info.english_meaning: to blowto breathe outto produce sound by blowingto blow a fireto manufacture by blowing to play a conch
info.hindI_arTa: PUMkanA Aga sulagAnA pradIpta karanA jalAnA mu~ha se bansI Adi vAdya bajAnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' agnisaMyogaSca muKavAyunA  lakzaRayA viDUnane santApena pUraRe ca ' iti DA.kA. vyAKyAyAm (2.33)

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'agnizwAnasmAt praDamAni yajYAt (aTarva॰18.2.28) praDamAtIti lewi rUpam praDamet vAtavad dUramAdadItetyarTaH

'yaTA somyaM puruzaM ganDAreByo'BinadDAkzamAnIya taM tato'tijane visfjet sa yaTA tatra prAN vA…praDmAyIt' (CAM॰u॰6.14.1) vikroSet SabdaM kuryAditi SaNkaraH –'divyO SaNKO pradaDmatuH' (gItA 1.14) prapUrayAmAsatuH
'sapatnIM me parADama' (f॰10.145.2) parARudetyarTaH parARudeti cATarvaRikAH paWanti
'indradvizwAmapaDamanti mAyayA tvacamasiknIM BUmano divaspari' (f॰9.73.5) te'paDmAtA mahAtmanA
'vi saptaraSmiraDamat tamAMsi' (f0 4504) vyaDamat=vAta iva vyakirat apAnudadityarTaH
'tava BujabaladarpADmAyamAnasya vAmaH Sirasi caraRa eza nyasyate vArayEnam' (veRI0 340) ADmAyamAnaH sPAyamAnaH
'yogADamanavikrItaM yogadAnapratigraham' (mana0 8165) ADamanaM banDakam yoga iha cCalamuktaH
'ADmAtastena hariRA na cakre SaNKarAq' (hari0 312013) ADmAtaH pUritaH
'yaccEtad bahuBirBerImADamadBiH SabdamuccArayadBi rmahAYSabda upalaByate' (mI0 SA0 BA0 11617) ADamadBiH pUrayadBiH tAqayadBiH
'aBi dasyuM vakureRA Damantoru jyotiScakraTurAryAya' (f0 111721) aBiDamanta upaDamanto vAtenAgniM saMyojayantaH
'yadImaha trito divyupaDmAteva Damati' (f0 595) ukto'rTaH yadImaha=yad Im aha
'(agniH) nAnupaDmAto nAnupajvalito jvalati' (Sa0 brA0 11837) anupaDmAtaH=aDutaH aDUtaH
'tataH SaNKamupADmAsIt' (BA0 vi0 4621 vi0 pu0 5302) upADmAsIt apUrayat luNi rUpam
'pUtirajjurupaDmAnI pUtiM senAM kfRotvamUm' (aTarva0 882) upaDmAnI upari niHSvasatI upari PUtkurvatI
